qualification.details: Eligibility for CSIR CMERI Technician Recruitment 2026 is based on a common educational qualification pattern applicable to all trades, with three alternative routes depending on experience level. Age limit is uniform across all posts, with relaxation available for reserved categories. | Candidates applying under Route 1 need SSC/10th Standard or equivalent with Science subjects and minimum 55% marks, along with an ITI certificate or National/State Trade Certificate in the relevant trade (Fitter, Electrician/Mechanic Electrical Power Drives, Electronics Mechanic/Instrument Mechanic, Machinist, Foundryman, Mechanic Motor Vehicle/Diesel, or Refrigeration & Air-Conditioning) from a recognized institution. Alternatively, under Route 2, candidates with SSC/10th Standard with Science subjects and minimum 55% marks can qualify with 2 years' full-time experience as an apprentice trainee in the relevant trade from a recognized institution. content_sections.heading: CSIR CMERI Technician Vacancy 2026 (Post-wise Breakdown)
content_sections.text: The CSIR CMERI Technician Vacancy 2026 covers 27 posts across seven trades at Durgapur (West Bengal) and its extension centre at Ludhiana (Punjab), with Fitter carrying the highest number of openings at 14. The table below lists each post code, trade, vacancy count, and category-wise reservation status. Out of the total 27 posts, 02 posts are horizontally reserved for Ex-Servicemen (ESM) .

content_sections.heading: CSIR CMERI Technician Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Eligibility for CSIR CMERI Technician Recruitment 2026 is based on a common educational qualification pattern applicable to all trades, with three alternative routes depending on experience level. Age limit is uniform across all posts, with relaxation available for reserved categories. Candidates applying under Route 1 need SSC/10th Standard or equivalent with Science subjects and minimum 55% marks , along with an ITI certificate or National/State Trade Certificate in the relevant trade (Fitter, Electrician/Mechanic Electrical Power Drives, Electronics Mechanic/Instrument Mechanic, Machinist, Foundryman, Mechanic Motor Vehicle/Diesel, or Refrigeration & Air-Conditioning) from a recognized institution. Alternatively, under Route 2, candidates with SSC/10th Standard with Science subjects and minimum 55% marks can qualify with 2 years' full-time experience as an apprentice trainee in the relevant trade from a recognized institution. Under Route 3, candidates with the same academic qualification can also qualify with 3 years of work experience in the relevant trade in a Ministry/Department/Organization/Public Sector Undertaking/Autonomous Body under Government of India/State/UT. The age limit for CSIR CMERI Technician posts is 18 to 28 years , with relaxation available for SC, OBC-NCL, PwBD, and ESM candidates as per Government of India rules.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CMERI Technician Salary & Pay Scale 2026
content_sections.text: Selected candidates under CSIR CMERI Technician Recruitment 2026 will be placed in Pay Level-2 of the 7th CPC Pay Matrix, applicable uniformly across all seven trades. content_sections.heading: CSIR CMERI Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Online Application Submission – Candidates apply online between 04 July 2026 and 03 August 2026. Screening of Applications – CSIR-CMERI verifies eligibility based on qualification, experience, and category. Further Selection Process – As per the detailed terms and conditions available on the official website. Final Result & Appointment – Selected candidates are appointed as Technician-1 (Group-II) at Durgapur or the Ludhiana extension centre.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CMERI Technician Apply Online 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official CMERI website at www.cmeri.res.in . Navigate to the "career" section, then click on "vacancies". Select "Advt. No. 01/2026" to view the detailed notification. Register with basic details and fill in the online application form for the desired post code. Upload the required educational qualification certificates, trade certificates, and other supporting documents. Review all entries carefully before final submission. Submit the application online before 03 August 2026, 05:00 PM IST , and save/print the confirmation for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CMERI Technician Recruitment 2026: Document Requirements
content_sections.text: Candidates applying for CSIR CMERI Technician posts must keep their educational and trade-related documents ready before starting the online application, since these are required to prove eligibility for the applied trade. The following documents are typically needed: SSC/10th Standard Certificate & Mark Sheet with Science subjects ITI Certificate or National/State Trade Certificate in the relevant trade Apprentice training completion certificate (if applying under the 2-year experience route) Work experience certificate from Government/PSU/Autonomous Body (if applying under the 3-year experience route) Category certificate (SC/OBC-NCL/EWS/PwBD/ESM), as applicable Age proof and valid photo identity proof

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid While Applying for CSIR CMERI Technician Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Many applicants risk rejection in CSIR CMERI Recruitment 2026 due to small but avoidable mistakes during the online application process. Keeping the following points in mind can help ensure a smooth and error-free submission. Applying for the wrong trade/post code: Double-check the post code (260101–260107) matches your qualification and trade certificate before submitting. Not meeting the 55% marks criterion: Candidates must have secured a minimum of 55% marks in SSC/10th Standard with Science subjects; applications below this threshold may be rejected. Missing experience certificates: Candidates applying under the 2-year or 3-year experience route must upload valid experience certificates, or the application may not be considered under that route. Ignoring the age limit window: Candidates must be between 18 and 28 years of age, with applicable relaxation claimed only with valid category certificates. Applying after the deadline: Since the portal closes precisely at 05:00 PM IST on 03 August 2026, candidates should avoid last-minute submission to prevent technical delays. Not checking for corrigendum: Candidates should regularly check the official website for any addendum or corrigendum related to Advt. No. 01/2026 before the deadline.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CSIR CMERI Technician Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online applications is 03 August 2026 at 05:00 PM IST, with the application window having opened on 04 July 2026 at 10:00 AM IST.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in CSIR CMERI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 27 Technician-1 (Group-II) vacancies across seven trades: Fitter, Electrician/Mechanic, Electronics Mechanic, Machinist, Foundryman, Mechanic (Motor Vehicle/Diesel), and Refrigeration & Air-Conditioning.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for CSIR CMERI Technician posts?
faq.answer: The age limit is 18 to 28 years, with relaxation available for SC, OBC-NCL, PwBD, and Ex-Servicemen candidates as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for CSIR CMERI Technician Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates need SSC/10th Standard with Science subjects and minimum 55% marks along with an ITI certificate or trade certificate, or alternatively 2 years of apprentice experience or 3 years of relevant work experience in a government organization.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for CSIR CMERI Technician posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be placed in Pay Level-2 of the 7th CPC Pay Matrix (₹19,900–₹63,200), with total emoluments of approximately ₹39,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for CSIR CMERI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection involves online application scrutiny followed by further selection stages as detailed in the official advertisement available on the CMERI website.

faq.question: Q7. Which trade has the highest vacancy in CSIR CMERI Technician Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Fitter has the highest vacancy with 14 posts, followed by Electrician/Mechanic (Electrical Power Drives) and Electronics Mechanic/Instrument Mechanic with 4 posts each.

faq.question: Q8. Are any posts reserved for Ex-Servicemen in CSIR CMERI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, out of the total 27 posts, 2 posts are reserved horizontally for Ex-Servicemen (ESM).

faq.question: Q9. Where is CSIR-CMERI located and where will selected candidates work?
faq.answer: CSIR-CMERI is located at Mahatma Gandhi Avenue, Durgapur-713209 (West Bengal), and selected candidates will be posted at Durgapur or its extension centre at Ludhiana, Punjab.

faq.question: Q10. Where can candidates check the official CSIR CMERI notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and online application link are available on the CMERI website at www.cmeri.res.in under Career → Vacancies → Advt. No. 01/2026.

faq.answer: The last date for submission of online applications is 03 August 2026 at 05:00 PM IST, with the application window having opened on 04 July 2026 at 10:00 AM IST.
